known_patterns: Terraform state lock contention during concurrent cluster joins
SSH "Broken pipe" during `sunbeam configure` (2-hour idle timeout)
Terraform Juju provider "inconsistent result" on `glance-to-ceph` during bootstrap
SSH "Broken pipe" during `sunbeam cluster join` (idle timeout, false failure)
Terraform apply timeout during `sunbeam configure` (Neutron API unreachable, 20-min hard timeout)
Traefik routes not ready — 502 Bad Gateway during `sunbeam configure` (race after cluster joins)
"No cilium pod found on node" — node name FQDN vs. short hostname mismatch
`juju wait-for` HA timeout — HA controller machines deployed from scratch by MAAS
`cinder-volume` install hook blocks on `(amqp) integration missing` during parallel joins — 20-minute wait expires
`k8s` cluster-relation-changed hooks + MetalLB/CSI pods not ready block parallel join wait — 30-minute wait expires
`sunbeam cluster join` false failure — control-plane node never appears in deployment-labelled K8S node list
`sunbeam configure` hypervisor wait times out because bootstrap `sunbeam-machine/0` is permanently `lost` after controller migration / credential rotation
`sunbeam cluster join` false-negative — 1200s wait expires while hypervisor hooks are still converging
`sunbeam configure` runs before Neutron finishes converging on a newly joined control-plane node
Charmhub docker-registry token API 503 causes bootstrap-time ImagePullBackOff across multiple charms
Snap Store assertion outage during storage-node join prevents `microceph` install and stalls model convergence
Silent bootstrap over SSH hits transport timeout on testflinger and surfaces as false failure
Runner-side DNS / SSH reachability loss during `sunbeam cluster bootstrap`
Bootstrap hits 3600s wait timeout after transient Keystone/Placement 502 leaves `nova` stuck in Bootstrapping
Bootstrap-node `snap install openstack` fails immediately with Snap Store HTTP 408
Juju controller charm download times out during bootstrap-node prepare phase
Parallel `sunbeam cluster join` false negative on `shared_maas` — 1800s wait expires while later joins and storage/certificate hooks are still converging
Bootstrap hits 3600s wait timeout — `ovn-central/0` permanently blocked after `check_pebble_handlers_ready()` Pebble socket timeout
`sunbeam configure` hits Neutron EOF via Traefik while ingress providers are still not ready
`sunbeam cluster resize` hits 3600s wait timeout because `nova/1` never leaves Bootstrapping after MySQL-router refusals and Placement API errors
Earlier compute-node `openstack-hypervisor/3` ceph-access hook times out querying snapd, and a later storage-node join inherits the model timeout
Bootstrap hits 3600s wait timeout because traefik-rgw is stuck in error due to find/delete charm bug
cinder-volume service start-limit-hit during rapid subordinate relation hooks
`sunbeam cluster bootstrap` timeout (3600s) due to extreme network slowness / slow Kubernetes image pulls
`sunbeam prepare-node-script` fails with "No external connectivity" to `api.charmhub.io`
Parallel `sunbeam cluster join` false negative — 1800s wait expires because joining unit is stuck 'Waiting for Cluster token' due to Juju controller relation event propagation delay
sunbeam_deploy.name: sunbeam_deploy

probes.pattern: k8s nodes\|Failed to get k8s\|nodes to update
probes.source_text: grep -i "k8s nodes\|Failed to get k8s\|nodes to update" output.log

probes.pattern: No matching k8s node found|Failed to get k8s nodes to update
probes.source_text: | grep -E 'No matching k8s node found|Failed to get k8s nodes to update'

probes.pattern: Apply complete|Waiting for apps|wait timed out
probes.source_text: | grep -E 'Apply complete|Waiting for apps|wait timed out'

probes.pattern: migration phase|connection is shut down|invalid entity name or password
probes.source_text: | grep -E 'migration phase|connection is shut down|invalid entity name or password'
grep -n 'sunbeam cluster list\|sunbeam configure -m manifest.yaml' generated/sunbeam/output.log

probes.pattern: unable to contact snap store\|snap install
probes.source_text: | grep -n 'unable to contact snap store\|snap install'

probes.pattern: Fetch and check assertions for snap "microceph"\|api.snapcraft.io
probes.source_text: | grep -n 'Fetch and check assertions for snap "microceph"\|api.snapcraft.io'
grep -n 'cluster bootstrap\|Timeout, server .* not responding' generated/sunbeam/output.log
grep -n 'cluster bootstrap\|Timeout, server .* not responding' generated/sunbeam/output.log
grep -n 'Temporary failure in name resolution' generated/github-runner/run.log

probes.pattern: wait timed out after 3599\|cinder-volume-mysql-router\|Container service not ready
probes.source_text: grep -n 'wait timed out after 3599\|cinder-volume-mysql-router\|Container service not ready' generated/sunbeam/output.log

probes.pattern: Failed to initialize placement client\|Bad Gateway\|stopped unexpectedly\|Starting conductor node
probes.source_text: | grep -n 'Failed to initialize placement client\|Bad Gateway\|stopped unexpectedly\|Starting conductor node'

probes.pattern: snap install openstack\|unexpected HTTP status code 408\|api.snapcraft.io/v2/snaps/refresh
probes.source_text: grep -n 'snap install openstack\|unexpected HTTP status code 408\|api.snapcraft.io/v2/snaps/refresh' generated/sunbeam/output.log

probes.pattern: cannot deploy controller application\|juju-controller\|TLS handshake timeout\|failed to bootstrap model
probes.source_text: grep -n 'cannot deploy controller application\|juju-controller\|TLS handshake timeout\|failed to bootstrap model' generated/sunbeam/output.log

probes.pattern: Node joined cluster with roles: storage
probes.source_text: grep -n 'Node joined cluster with roles: storage' generated/sunbeam/output.log

probes.pattern: cluster resize\|wait timed out after 3599\|nova/1\|Container service not ready
probes.source_text: grep -n 'cluster resize\|wait timed out after 3599\|nova/1\|Container service not ready' $WORK/output.log

probes.pattern: ECONNREFUSED\|Failed to initialize placement client\|stopped unexpectedly\|Container service not ready
probes.source_text: | grep -n 'ECONNREFUSED\|Failed to initialize placement client\|stopped unexpectedly\|Container service not ready'

known_patterns: vault unseal timeout — raft follower bootstrap/challenge not completing
vault update-status hook failure — vault/0 enters error state during enable
observability enable juju-wait timeout — aodh/gnocchi payload containers not ready
orchestration enable timeout — heat-api-cfn CrashLoopBackOff from Pebble port bind conflict
telemetry enable timeout — openstack-exporter stuck waiting for logging despite healthy telemetry stack
observability enable false failure — remote command printed success, then SSH transport/DNS failed
telemetry enable timeout — openstack-exporter keeps waiting even after all Loki endpoints are published
observability enable timeout — opentelemetry-collector/0 stayed blocked despite healthy relation hooks
secrets enable timeout — Barbican bootstraps before the `barbican-api` Pebble socket exists
orchestration enable false timeout — Heat pod starts far too late, then self-recovers after the 900s wait expires
telemetry enable timeout — partial Loki endpoint publication leaves several apps stuck on `(logging) integration incomplete`
tls enable false failure — virtual_maas tunnel dropped during the SSH session
observability enable false failure — virtual_maas SSH tunnel dropped mid-command
secrets enable false failure — Sunbeam CLI printed success, then aborted on a closed HTTP connection
telemetry enable timeout — Juju CMR event delivery failure leaves loki/0 unhookable, breaking the entire Loki URL chain
ubuntu-pro enable failed due to expired HPE SDR repository GPG key on hardware-observer nodes
images-sync enable false timeout — images-sync pod starts far too late, then self-recovers after the 900s wait expires
